latest_run.selection_reason: The 21 cadence slot selected Cataloger. Risk queue was empty, catalog drift remained blocked pending a runnable build surface, and a concrete Cataloger maintenance item existed to add a CI-backed catalog refresh path.
actions: Resolved architectonic/skills through the GitHub connector and fetched required files directly by path from main before selecting a role.
Verified package.json exposes npm run build:catalog as python scripts/build_distribution_catalog.py.
Verified scripts/build_distribution_catalog.py writes dist/catalog.json, dist/install-manifest.json, and dist/catalog.md as a coupled generated set.
Confirmed no .github/workflows/build-catalog.yml file existed by direct fetch.
Created .github/workflows/catalog-refresh.yml with workflow_dispatch and path triggers for catalog-relevant files.

Configured the workflow to check out the repo, set up Python 3.11, install pyyaml, run npm run build:catalog, show diffs for generated catalog surfaces, and auto-commit dist/catalog.json, dist/catalog.md, and dist/install-manifest.json when changed.
Kept catalog and package blockers open because this connector pass created a build path but did not execute the workflow or verify generated-surface parity.
Did not modify skills, dist/skills, generated catalog files, install manifest, reports, or third-party source content.

The new MCP security skill is not reflected in dist/catalog.json, dist/catalog.md, dist/install-manifest.json, or reports.
